name: Franklin BSP Realty Trust Inc. 7.50% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Franklin BSP Realty Trust Inc. 7.50% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents preferred shares in Franklin BSP Realty Trust Inc., a REIT that originates, acquires, and manages commercial real estate debt investments. These preferred shares offer a fixed dividend rate of 7.50% and have a preference over common stock in dividend payments and liquidation. The company is headquartered in New York, NY.
